experience.title: MIS Executive / Data Reporting Support
experience.description: Supporting internal reporting, operational tracking, data validation, dashboard preparation, and workflow improvements for business and backend teams.
achievements: Prepared MIS reports and business reporting outputs for operational review.
Wrote and used SQL / PostgreSQL queries for filtering, validation, and structured data extraction.
Supported Power BI dashboards for KPI visibility and reporting clarity.
Worked on Excel / Google Sheets based reporting and automation support.
Handled AI Sensy chatbot workflow support including utility template coordination, process handling, and campaign-related backend support.
Helped improve reporting accuracy, manual effort reduction, and internal process efficiency.
